SS3-1020: Indoor key-operated switch. Surface or flush mount. Function – circuit or auxiliary loop switching with automatic return to off position. Reinforced polycarbonate housing with integral back box. Key activation. 2-position single-pole (SP), spring return, silver-plated contacts. 1A@115VAC, 1A@24VDC. Rated life 10,000 cycles.
